headline: Can FirstEnergy's Grid Investments Drive Long-Term Earnings Growth?
summary: FirstEnergy's $36B grid plan targets 10% annual rate base growth and 6-8% EPS growth through 2030 while strengthening reliability.

raw.headline: Can FirstEnergy's Grid Investments Drive Long-Term Earnings Growth?

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Entergy, Raises Price Target to $139
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeremy Tonet   maintains Entergy (NYSE:ETR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $129 to $139.

raw.headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Entergy, Raises Price Target to $139
raw.summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeremy Tonet   maintains Entergy (NYSE:ETR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $129 to $139.

headline: Entergy partners with MHI Group on road map to cut costs by 50%
summary: The partnership will focus on integrating MHI Group’s gas turbine and CCS technologies at Entergy’s power generation facilities.

raw.headline: Entergy partners with MHI Group on road map to cut costs by 50%
